title: Lithuanian 1-gram frequency list from the Delfi.lt corpus

publication.scope: Every row from the reviewed Lithuanian 1-gram source CSV.
publication.access: Static JSON chunks preserve all one-gram rows without requiring the browser explorer to load the full million-row list.

provenance.citation: Bielinskienė, A., Boizou, L., Bumbulienė, I., Kovalevskaitė, J., Krilavičius, T., Mandravickaitė, J., Rimkutė, E., Vilkaitė-Lozdienė, L. 2019. Lithuanian 1-gram dataset. Baltic Institute of Advanced Technology and Vytautas Magnus University. CLARIN-LT Repository. https://hdl.handle.net/20.500.11821/27.

constraints: Treat each source row as a raw one-gram token count, not as a lemmatised frequency.
Preserve the source token string, including punctuation and non-alphabetic forms.
Parse integer-valued scientific notation exactly before exposing numeric JSON counts.
Use the manifest and chunk index before requesting individual data chunks.

views.title: Delfi.lt corpus one-grams
views.description: Raw one-gram token frequencies from the source, ordered by descending count.
